title: This Theory Explains the Neanderthal DNA Mystery - David Reich
summary: David Reich discusses a theory explaining patterns in Neanderthal DNA found in modern human genomes. The episode explores genetic evidence of human-Neanderthal admixture and what it reveals about prehistoric human history and evolution.
